name: Basic Shepherds Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook potatoes until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain.
3. Add milk, butter, nutmeg, salt, and pepper to the mashed potatoes and mash until smooth and fluffy.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Sauté onions, carrots, and celery for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with thyme and chili flakes.
5. Add ground beef and cook until no longer pink.
6. Stir in cooked roast beef. Sprinkle with flour, then pour in beef broth, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper. Stir well to combine. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Spread meat mixture in a square casserole dish. Spread mashed potatoes over the top.
8. Bake at 375°F for 35-45 minutes until heated through. Place under broiler for 1 minute.
